dialogos.texto_en: Wow, it's still early,\nand there are so many people here already.
Are they here to eat breakfast, like us?
I thought about this yesterday too,\nbut there's something exotic about this cityscape,\ndon't you think?
Well, to fully enjoy our trip,\nlet's start with a delicious breakfast.
Here, we've got to have something\nthat's only available in Okinawa.
Like the standard, Okinawa soba or taco rice.\nThere are also convenient options\nlike pork and egg rice balls
Also, there are many American-style options.\nThe variety of items on menus,\nas well as restaurants themselves, is impressive.
I-it's so hard to choose...
Uesugi-san, what do you wa%p-2;――
Futaro,\nI think rice porridge would be good for breakfast.
It's not very Okinawan,\nbut it's easy to digest and good\nfor our tired bodies.
That's not a bad idea.\nWe've had many fancy meals for the past couple of\ndays, so we should give our stomachs a break.
I knew you'd understand, Futaro.
Hey, Fu-kun!\nDon't you think something smells REALLY good?
Yeah, now that you mention it,\nit does smell good.
It must be freshly baked bread!\nYou can tell just by the aroma how good it is.
Does it really make that much of a difference\nif it's fresh?
Yes, it's totally different!\nYou can't even compare it.\nCome on, let's try it!
Th-they beat me to the punch?!
Rice porridge, right?
Bread, obviously.
I don't really care either way, but let's ask everyone%p-2;――
I want you to choose, Futaro.
Fu-kun, which do you like?
I-I said, you don't need to get so close to me...
Futaro, choose me.
HUH?!
*peek*
Huh?
Fu-kun, you like ME more, right?
HUUHH?!
*peek*
Hmmm?
Which do you like better?
Uwaaa!
I-I got it!\nI'll choose, just get AWAY!
Mmphh....
What're you so embarassed about.
*sigh*
(What's going on with these two?\n They're clearly acting weird.)
Hmm, let me see.\nI think I prefer rice porridge.
Huh? How come?
I feel like eating something gentle on my stomach.\nUnlike you guys, my stomach isn't used to luxury.
Oh WELL, if you say so, Fu-kun,\nthere's nothing we can do about it.
Teehee, I win.
U-umm...
Yotsuba.\nWe've decided what to have for breakfast.
I-it's rice porridge, isn't it?!
Yeah, it's rice porridge.\nIt'll definitely be good.
Yotsuba, is that okay?
Okay. Uesugi-san chose it and all that,\nso there's no problem.
Sorry Yotsuba, I feel like I made the decision\nwithout consulting you.
No worries.\nI'm fine with it as long as\nit's okay with everyone else.
Fu-kun, come on, let's go quickly.\nThere are many places I want to go to after breakfast.
Hey, don't pull me like that!
Do you think this is really okay?
Big bro is too weak to push back!
Well, let's look forward to Futaro-kun's next effort,\nshall we.
The rice porridge was delicious.
Yeah, it wasn't bad.
Now then!\nNow that I'm fully awake, Yotsuba,\nwhat are today's plans again?
Today%p-2;――
Hey, Fu-kun! Can you come shopping with me?
I don't mind, but what are we buying?
There's a shop with some nice trinkets\nthat I want to check out.
Futaro.\nLet's go look for souvenirs instead.
Souvenirs, all of a sudden?\nWe're in the middle of the trip, aren't we?
I just want to get an idea of what's available,\nso we won't have trouble deciding later.
U-um?\nDid I perhaps have bad timing?
Hey, Futaro-kun.\nYou have to make a good decision here, you know?
No, it doesn't matter to me where we go.
Yeah...
Aren't we planning to look around Kokusai dori?\nThen, that's fine, right?
Let's go, Fu-kun.
Wait, Nino. Futaro hasn't decided where to go yet.
Huh?! This again?!
Yotsuba, are you okay with this?\nThose two are gonna butt in front of you again\nat this rate.
It's not like I'm competing with them or anything.\nIf Nino or Miku wants to go somewhere,\nI think that's fine.
Then, if you suggest a place, Yotsuba,\nwhere do you think Futaro-kun will choose?
Huh?
Yotsuba,\nwhose option would you like Futaro-kun to choose?
W-wait a second, Ichika!\nAren't you kind of getting off topic?
Really?\nI don't really think I am.
I mean, Uesugi-san is...
Futaro-kun, is what?
D-dating...aawwwww...
Yotsuba?
Ichika, you're going too far!
Uh oh. Oops.
Hey, Yotsuba.\nAs for where we're going next%p-2;――
Itsuki-chan, you've got this!
Huhhh?!
Hm? What's going on with Yotsuba?
W-well now, we haven't quite decided yet,\ntherefore, we can't answer your question right away.\nCould you give us some time to think about it?
What's that supposed to mean?\nThat means you all have a lot of places you want to go?\nIn that case, maybe we should just have free time.
Right! That's it! Free time it is!\nAs expected of you, Uesugi-kun, you're so perceptive.\nLet's have free time for the morning!
O-okay.\nSo, free time for the morning.\nLet's meet up when it's time to leave.
Nice, Itsuki-chan.\nThanks.
I give up.\nI don't even know what I'm saying anymore.
Thank goodness for big bro's\npoor perception skills.
